steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly states the study's purpose in its opening: “to study how butterfly color and weather conditions relate to butterfly behavior.” This central focus frames everything else—all findings and details support this main research question.

steps.title: Match the meaning to choices
steps.content: Choice D captures this exact purpose: a large study examined how color and weather influence behavior. The others either misrepresent the findings, add unstated information, or prioritize a method over the research question. This matches choice D — D is correct.
